philosophy.text: We believe learning a language should feel like an experience — not a lecture. Small groups. Honest feedback. Real progress, level by level.
items: Practical English usage — not only theory
Speaking and communication in every session

about.label: About
about.heading: A modern academy for modern learners
about.p1: Compass Academy was built on a simple idea: learning a language should feel like living it. We combine structured curriculums with real conversation and small cohorts so every student gets the attention they deserve.
about.p2: Our instructors are certified, our materials are crafted in-house, and every level ends with a real evaluation — so progress is something you can see and feel, not just a promise.

courses.label: 04 — Catalogue
courses.heading: Courses — choose your path.
courses.description: Structured programs from beginner to advanced. Every level includes recordings, practice sheets, and an end-of-level certificate.
courses.unavailable: This course is not yet available.

footer.description: A modern language academy designed for learners who want to speak with confidence.

english.title: English Course
english.tagline: Speak with confidence — from A1 to C1.
english.description: At The Compass Academy, students don't just study English — they live the language. Our CEFR-based program (A1–C1) is designed to help learners master speaking, listening, reading, and writing through practical communication, intensive learning, and continuous guidance from experienced instructors.
english.longDescription:
At The Compass Academy, students don't just study English — they live the language. Our CEFR-based program (A1–C1) is designed to help learners master speaking, listening, reading, and writing through practical communication, intensive learning, and continuous guidance from experienced instructors.

• CEFR-based curriculum (A1–C1)
• Master speaking, listening, reading, and writing
• 2 sessions per week, each 2 hours
• 1.5 months per level progression
• Small groups (maximum 12 students) for personalized attention
• Professional and experienced English teachers
• Interactive and active learning methods
• Daily teacher follow-up and personalized feedback
• Regular quizzes and progress assessments
• Real-life communication practice in every session
• Supportive environment focused on confidence and fluency
highlights: Speak English confidently in everyday and professional situations
Understand spoken English with greater ease
Read and comprehend English texts effectively
Write clear and accurate emails, messages, and essays
Express ideas confidently in conversations and presentations
Progress confidently through the CEFR levels toward C1 proficiency
learningSupport: Daily practice sheets covering grammar, vocabulary, reading, and writing
Vocabulary lists organized by each CEFR level
Speaking activities based on real-life situations
Listening exercises using authentic English content
Continuous teacher feedback and progress monitoring
Level assessments to ensure mastery before advancing
requirements: Basic English knowledge (according to your current level)
Willingness to actively participate during sessions

deliverables.title: Session recordings
deliverables.body: Uploaded to Google Drive and shared within 24 hours. Used for revision and missed sessions.

deliverables.title: PDF practice sheets
deliverables.body: Vocabulary, grammar and speaking tasks shared via Google Classroom. Printable and digital format.

deliverables.title: Telegram group
deliverables.body: One dedicated group per cohort. Communication with teacher, Q&A, file sharing, and updates.

deliverables.title: End-of-level test
deliverables.body: Final evaluation per level — tests speaking, grammar, vocabulary, and listening.

deliverables.title: Completion certificate
deliverables.body: Issued after passing the final test. Confirms level completion (A1 through C1).

curriculum.name: Beginner
curriculum.focus: Greetings, basic grammar, present tense, everyday vocabulary.

curriculum.name: Elementary
curriculum.focus: Past & future tenses, short conversations, travel and daily life.

curriculum.name: Intermediate
curriculum.focus: Express opinions, handle most situations, write structured texts.

curriculum.name: Upper-Intermediate
curriculum.focus: Fluent discussion, nuanced grammar, professional & academic English.

curriculum.name: Advanced
curriculum.focus: Complex topics, idiomatic speech, advanced writing and presentations.

instructor.name: Hanane Boumediene
instructor.title: Senior English Language Instructor
instructor.bio: Hanane Boumediene is a certified English language instructor with over 12 years of teaching experience. She holds a Ph.D. in Applied Linguistics and has helped thousands of students achieve fluency in English.
instructor.philosophy: Language learning should be practical, enjoyable, and built on real communication. Every student has the ability to become fluent with the right guidance and consistent practice.

reviews.name: سارة بن خدة
reviews.text: قبل ما نسجل كنت نفهم الإنجليزية بصح كي يجي وقت الهدرة نبلوكي وما نعرفش نعبر على روحي. من بعد ما دخلت للكور تبدلت بزاف، لأن كل حصة كنا نهدرو ونطبقو مباشرة. الأستاذ كان يصححلنا الأخطاء ويعطينا نصائح باش نتحسنو. حتى المتابعة اليومية والاختبارات خلتني نبقى ديما نراجع. بصراحة من أفضل الكورسات لي قريتهم وأنصح بيه أي واحد حاب يتعلم الإنجليزية بطريقة صحيحة.

reviews.name: محمد لعروسي
reviews.text: كنت ديما نأجل تعلم الإنجليزية على خاطر كنت نحسها صعيبة. بصح مع هاد البرنامج كلش كان منظم حسب المستوى، وكل درس يزيد يبني على لي قبلو. أكثر حاجة عجبتني هي بلي القروبات صغار، يعني كل واحد يلقى فرصة يهدر والأستاذ يتبعو وحدو. بعد نهاية المستوى وليت نفهم الفيديوهات بالإنجليزية ونقدر نهدر بثقة أكثر مع الناس.

reviews.name: نسرين بن عمر
reviews.text: كنت نحتاج الإنجليزية في الخدمة، خاصة في الاجتماعات وقراءة الوثائق التقنية. بعد ما كملت المستوى لاحظت فرق كبير في الـSpeaking والـListening. الطريقة ما كانتش مجرد قواعد، بالعكس كنا نطبقو كل حاجة مباشرة بالمحادثات والتمارين. حتى الاختبارات اليومية كانت مفيدة لأنها خلاتني نبقى مركز وما ننساش واش قريت. تجربة ممتازة وإن شاء الله نكمل حتى المستويات المتقدمة.

reviews.name: ريان قاسمي
reviews.text: أكثر حاجة فرحتني في هاد التكوين هي الجو داخل الحصص. ما كان حتى ضغط ولا خوف من الغلط، بالعكس الأساتذة كانوا يشجعونا نهدرو حتى إذا غلطنا ويصححولنا بطريقة محترمة. كنت ديما نخاف نهدر بالإنجليزية، أما اليوم نقدر نقدم عرض كامل بالإنجليزية بلا توتر. المتابعة اليومية والتمارين كانوا السبب الكبير في هاد التطور.

reviews.name: فاطمة الزهراء بوحفص
reviews.text: كنت حاب نوجد روحي للدراسة في الخارج، ولهذا كنت نبحث على كورس يكون منظم ويعتمد على الممارسة. الحمد لله لقيت هاد البرنامج. عجبني بزاف بلي كل مستوى عندو أهداف واضحة، وكل يوم كاين واجبات واختبارات صغيرة باش تعرف واش فهمت وواش لازم تراجع. خلال شهر ونص فقط حسيت بلي المستوى تاعي تبدل خاصة في المحادثة والنطق.

reviews.name: يوسف بوعلام
reviews.text: كنت نجرب نتعلم الإنجليزية وحدي من اليوتيوب والتطبيقات، بصح ما كنتش نلقى الاستمرارية. مع Compass Academy كلش تبدل، لأن كاين متابعة حقيقية والأساتذة ديما متواجدين للإجابة على الأسئلة. القروبات الصغيرة خلات كل طالب ياخذ حقو، وما تحسش روحك مهمش. اليوم نقدر نكتب إيميلات بالإنجليزية ونهدر مع الزبائن بثقة أكبر.

reviews.name: ليلى بوعزة
reviews.text: من أول حصة حسيت بلي هاد البرنامج مختلف. الأستاذ خلاّنا نهدرو من البداية وما بقيناش غير نسمعو الدرس. كل يوم كان كاين نشاط جديد، مرة محادثة، مرة Listening، مرة Writing، وهذا خلا التعلم ممتع وماشي ممل. أكثر حاجة عجبتني هي المتابعة المستمرة، إذا تغيب ولا تضعف في نقطة معينة يوجهوك باش تتحسن. أنصح أي واحد حاب يطور الإنجليزية تاعو يسجل بدون تردد.

faq.q: How do I know my starting level?
faq.a: Every new student takes a free placement test before enrolling — speaking + written — so you start at the right level.

faq.q: What happens if I miss a session?
faq.a: All sessions are recorded and shared via Google Drive within 24 hours. Practice sheets stay available throughout the level.
Yes. The price covers a full 1.5-month level. There's no long-term commitment — you can stop or pause between levels.
New cohorts open every month. Reach out via the enroll form and we'll send you the next start dates.
After passing the end-of-level test, you receive a certificate confirming your level completion — from A1 through C1.

faq.q: Is the course in-person or online?
faq.a: All sessions are held online via Zoom. You can attend from anywhere with a stable internet connection.

spanish.title: Spanish Course
spanish.tagline: Learn Spanish the practical way — A1 + A2.
spanish.description: Learning Spanish has never been easier. At The Compass Academy, you'll follow a CEFR-based program (A1 + A2) designed to help you speak, understand, read, and write Spanish with confidence through practical lessons and real conversations.
spanish.longDescription:
Learning Spanish has never been easier. At The Compass Academy, you'll follow a CEFR-based program (A1 + A2) designed to help you speak, understand, read, and write Spanish with confidence through practical lessons and real conversations.

• CEFR curriculum (A1 + A2)
• Focus on speaking from day one
• Reading, writing & listening practice
• 3-month program, 2 sessions per week
• Small groups (max. 12 students)
• Experienced and supportive teachers
• Daily follow-up, quizzes & personalized feedback
• Interactive learning with real-life situations
highlights: Speak Spanish confidently in everyday conversations
Understand native Spanish speakers more easily
Build a strong vocabulary and grammar foundation
Communicate naturally while traveling, studying, or working
Complete A1 and A2 levels in one program
learningSupport: Level exams before moving to the next stage

instructor.name: G.Amina
instructor.title: Spanish Language Instructor
instructor.bio: Our Spanish instructors are certified professionals with years of experience teaching Spanish to Arabic speakers. They use communicative methods focused on real-world application.
instructor.philosophy: Language learning should be practical, enjoyable, and built on real communication. Every student has the ability to become fluent with the right guidance and consistent practice.

reviews.name: أحمد بن علي
reviews.text: This course transformed my confidence in speaking Spanish. The structured approach and real conversation practice made all the difference.

reviews.name: سارة محمود
reviews.text: The pronunciation and fluency sections were incredibly helpful. The instructors are knowledgeable and the peer practice sessions gave me confidence.

faq.q: How do I know my starting level?
faq.a: Every new student takes a free placement test before enrolling — speaking + written — so you start at the right level.

faq.q: What happens if I miss a session?
faq.a: All sessions are recorded and shared via Google Drive within 24 hours. Practice sheets stay available throughout the level.
Yes. The price covers the full A1 + A2 program (3 months). There's no long-term commitment — you can stop or pause after completion.
New cohorts open every month. Reach out via the enroll form and we'll send you the next start dates.
After passing the end-of-level test, you receive a certificate confirming your level completion — A1 and A2.

faq.q: Is the course in-person or online?
faq.a: All sessions are held online via Zoom. You can attend from anywhere with a stable internet connection.
